title: Glocks R Us
description: Simple gun mod with Glock & attachments.
body:
This mod adds a fully automatic Glock 9mm handgun to Minecraft, available exclusively in Creative Mode.

Key Features:

- Laser Sight: Toggleable laser sight (off, green, or red).
- Firing Modes: Switch between single-shot (⁍) and full-auto (⁍⁍⁍).
- Extended Mag: 33 bullets per clip.
- Unlimited Ammo: No need to worry about running out of bullets or clips.
